title: polystichum yunnanense var. fargesii
intro: Polystichum yunnanense var. fargesii, also known as the Farges' Yunnan fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Farges' Yunnan fern include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Farges' Yunnan fern is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can also be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and tinctures.
